Settle into a lounge chair, enjoy a cold drink, and take in alpine views while a rotating lineup of artists fills the air with acoustic rock, country, blues, and more. With hiking trails just steps away, it's an easy, all-day experience for everyone.
events.location: Silver Lake Base Area, Deer Valley, Park City, UT

events.title: Guided Historical Hike
events.description: Step into Park City's past on a guided hike through Deer Valley's scenic terrain, where fresh mountain air meets stories of the area's rich mining history. This three- to four-hour hike covers moderate terrain, typically under six miles, as guests hike around Empire. Meet at the Mid-Mountain Trailhead on Marsac Ave, above the Montage, for an 8:30 a.m. departure.
